We made this possible.

And this is just the beginning.

What’s next on your list?
Comment the artist you’re waiting for 👇🔥

Meaningful conversations. Lasting partnerships. 

#PANTHEONDevelopment

Such a pleasure sitting down in the beautiful new premises of Pantheon Development with owner and developer Kalpesh Kinariwala, the visionary behind one of the most exciting new launches in Jumeirah Village Triangle: Voxa Residences.

This is not just another project. Voxa is a fully integrated lifestyle concept blending residential, retail, and workspace into one seamless ecosystem, designed for how people actually live today. With 24+ world-class amenities (from beach-style pools and outdoor cinema to wellness zones, padel courts, and even pet-friendly spaces), it’s no surprise it’s quickly becoming a favourite among both end-users and investors. 

What stood out to me most is Pantheon’s philosophy: affordable luxury, delivered with consistency and on time - something they’ve built a strong reputation for across multiple successful projects in Dubai. 

Kalpesh himself is incredibly grounded, sharp, and deeply hands-on (with a great sense of humour!). The kind of developer who understands not just construction, but market psychology, investor expectations, and long-term value creation.

Thank you for such a warm, candid, and insightful conversation. These are the kind of discussions that remind me why I love this industry. @kalpesh.kinariwala @director_pantheon_developments @pantheon_development 

#offplandubai #dubairealestate #investindubai #voxa #dubaipropertymarket

When friends meet business, the circle gets stronger. Introducing people we trust to a vision we believe in that’s how momentum builds. 

#PANTHEONDevelopment

We are honoured to welcome Kalpesh Kinariwala, Founder & Chairman of Hop Events, as a Speaker at Shows of India Conclave 2026.

A visionary entrepreneur known for his sharp business acumen and long-term thinking, Kalpesh’s journey is defined by resilience, foresight, and the ability to turn challenges into opportunities. From humble beginnings to building large-scale, impactful ventures, he has consistently led with innovation, trust, and value creation.

Through Hop Events, he has been instrumental in curating and executing large-format live experiences delivering high-energy concerts, brand-led experiential events, and premium entertainment showcases at iconic venues such as the Coca-Cola Arena, Etihad Arena and across the UAE’s vibrant live entertainment ecosystem. These experiences are part of a larger landscape that hosts global concerts, festivals, and cultural showcases at scale. 

With a deep passion for inspiring the next generation, he brings powerful insights on leadership, growth, and building enduring businesses.

📍 May 1–2, 2026
📍 The Leela Ambience Convention Hotel, Delhi

🎟️ Book Your Tickets Via The Link In Bio 🚀
